info.title: probectl provider/management plane API (ee, S-T1)
info.description: The MSP operator surface: tenant lifecycle, fleet-across-tenants health, audited break-glass. Operators are a privilege domain distinct from tenant users (mandatory TOTP MFA); they hold NO implicit access to tenant telemetry — the only telemetry path is an active, tenant-consented, time-bounded grant, and every access is written to the separate provider audit stream.

post.summary: Create the first admin from the deployment bootstrap token (single-use)
Exchange an enrollment token for the TOTP binding (secret returned once)
Verify the first TOTP code, set the password, activate the operator
Operator login: email + password + TOTP (MFA mandatory)

get.summary: License state for the console banner (tier, state, horizons)

post.summary: Create an operator; returns the one-time enrollment token (admin)
Enable/disable an operator; disablement revokes sessions immediately (admin)

Provision a tenant (licensed tenant band enforced; isolation_model pooled|siloed|hybrid — siloed/hybrid require the siloed_isolation feature and provision the tenant's isolated stores; residency pins a configured data plane)
Suspend a tenant: its users are rejected at the API; data and ingestion are untouched
Offboard a tenant: API access stops; a siloed/hybrid tenant's isolated stores are torn down (pooled-data export/verifiable deletion is S-T5)

get.summary: Fleet-across-tenants health: agent counts + versions per tenant — never telemetry
List break-glass grants with derived state

post.summary: Request a break-glass grant (pending until the tenant consents; TTL capped)

get.summary: THE break-glass telemetry read: requires an ACTIVE consented grant owned by the caller; every access is provider-audited
Pending grants for the caller's tenant (tenant session)

post.summary: Approve or deny a grant (tenant admin session; directory.write)

get.summary: Per-tenant usage (showback): UsageRecords for [from,to) with rollup=hour|day (default day); counters sum, gauges peak
The billing-export feed (generic, vendor-neutral): format=csv (default) | jsonl with the documented stable column contract

put.summary: Set a tenant's creation quotas (admin; audited; creation-gating only — telemetry is never quota-dropped)

get.summary: A tenant's white-label brand (TenantBranding: product name, inline logo, login message, S8a token overrides, email branding, custom domain)

put.summary: Set a tenant's brand (admin; validated against the core token/logo/domain contracts; audited)

get.summary: The provider master brand (the default for tenants without their own)

put.summary: Set the provider master brand (admin; audited)

post.summary: IRREVERSIBLE verifiable erasure of a tenant across every store (the CORE S-T5 engine; admin SoD; confirm=<slug>; returns + audits the deletion attestation)
